message.content:
@startuml

title "UML Diagram: DataType CorrespondenceDefinition in Context"

class "Map" as Map {
  correspondence : CorrespondenceDefinition
}
note top of Map : CollectionsPattern::

class "ConceptMap" as ConceptMap {
  correspondence : CorrespondenceDefinition
  displayLabel : LabelForDisplay
  identifier : Identifier
  usage : InternationalString
  validDates : DateRange
}
note top of ConceptMap : Conceptual::

class "InstanceVariableMap" as InstanceVariableMap {
  comparison : ComparisonOperator
  correspondence : CorrespondenceDefinition
  identifier : Identifier
  setValue : String
}
note top of InstanceVariableMap : FormatDescription::

class "CorrespondenceDefinition" as CorrespondenceDefinition <<dataType>> #FFD700 {
  commonality : InternationalString
  commonalityCode : ControlledVocabularyEntry
  difference : InternationalString
  matching : MatchingCriterion
}

Map ..> CorrespondenceDefinition
ConceptMap ..> CorrespondenceDefinition
InstanceVariableMap ..> CorrespondenceDefinition

note as N1
  **Hints**
  - Move the mouse cursor over a name to see more information.
  - Click on a name to go to the corresponding page.
  - The use of the data type is represented here by a dotted line (not formal UML).
end note

caption DDI Cross Domain Integration (DDI-CDI)  1.0 - StructuredDataTypes::CorrespondenceDefinition

@enduml
